instructions.message: Monitor LinkedIn comments, connections, and engagement
HONEST EMPTY STATE - If LinkedIn API not configured, show clear message: 'LinkedIn API not connected. Requires: Company page or Developer account'. Do NOT show fake stats
JOB TITLE DISPLAY - Show commenter's job title and company when available. Helps Ian prioritize responses
YOUR REPLIES HIGHLIGHTED - Mark comments you've already replied to. Show reply text inline or on hover
ENGAGEMENT METRICS - Track: Post views, Likes, Comments, Shares. Show trends over time

developments.message: Initial LinkedIn monitor component created with job title display
Removed mock data - now shows honest empty state with API configuration instructions

insights.message: Requires LinkedIn API access (company page or developer account)

brainstorming.message: Browser automation could fetch public profile data without full API access
